chapter_title: Umbrellas, sun umbrellas, walking-sticks, seat-sticks, whips, riding-crops, and parts thereof
inclusions: Heading 66.01 — Umbrellas and sun umbrellas (including walking-stick umbrellas, garden umbrellas and similar umbrellas)
Heading 66.02 — Walking-sticks, seat-sticks, whips, riding-crops and the like

Heading 66.03 — Parts, trimmings and accessories of articles of heading 66.01 or 66.02: handles and knobs; umbrella frames (including frames mounted on shafts); umbrella shafts; ribs and stretchers. Note 2: 66.03 does NOT cover parts/trimmings/accessories of TEXTILE MATERIAL (covers, tassels, thongs, umbrella cases, etc.) even when presented with 66.01/66.02 articles — those are classified separately

exclusions.condition: Measure walking-sticks, folding rules incorporated in walking-sticks and the like
exclusions.action: Redirect to heading 90.17 (drawing instruments, measuring instruments) — Note 1(a). Walking-sticks with integral measuring function → 90.17

exclusions.condition: Firearm-sticks (gun-sticks), sword-sticks, loaded walking-sticks or the like
exclusions.action: Redirect to Chapter 93 (arms and ammunition) — Note 1(b). These function as weapons despite cane appearance

exclusions.condition: Toy umbrellas, toy sun umbrellas and other goods of Chapter 95
exclusions.action: Redirect to Chapter 95 (toys, games and sports requisites) — Note 1(c). Small decorative/toy umbrellas → 95.03

exclusions.condition: Parts, trimmings or accessories of textile material for umbrellas/walking-sticks; umbrella covers, cases, tassels, thongs — even when presented WITH the umbrella/stick but not fitted to it
exclusions.action: Classify separately by material — Note 2. Umbrella cover of nylon presented separately from umbrella frame → Ch.63 or appropriate textile chapter. NOT treated as part of 66.01/66.02. If fitted/assembled onto the umbrella → part of the complete article (66.01)

classification_rules.rule: Note 1 — Three specific exclusions overriding the walking-stick character
classification_rules.description: Despite the 'walking-stick' form, three categories are excluded from Ch.66: (1) Measure walking-sticks (measuring function → 90.17). (2) Firearm-sticks, sword-sticks, loaded sticks (weapon function → Ch.93). (3) Toy umbrellas/sticks (toy function → Ch.95). The essential character or primary function overrides the form: a sword hidden in a cane → Ch.93 (weapon), not 66.02.

classification_rules.rule: Note 2 — Textile accessories presented WITH but not fitted to umbrellas: classified separately
classification_rules.description: Heading 66.03 covers parts and accessories of articles 66.01/66.02 — BUT when textile accessories (covers, cases, tassels, thongs) are presented WITH the umbrella/stick article but NOT already fitted/mounted onto the article, they are NOT treated as part of Ch.66 goods. They must be classified SEPARATELY by their own material chapter. This prevents a loose umbrella sleeve from pulling classification into 66.03. If the textile cover is permanently attached → it's part of the complete 66.01 umbrella and not separately classified.

classification_rules.rule: Key boundary: 66.01 (complete umbrellas) vs 66.03 (umbrella parts/frames only) vs Ch.63 (textile covers separately sold)
classification_rules.description: 66.01 = COMPLETE umbrella (canopy + frame + handle assembled). 66.03 = PARTS of umbrellas presented separately: bare frames without canopy, handles/knobs, shafts, ribs, stretchers — all WITHOUT textile covering. A bare steel umbrella frame without fabric → 66.03. An umbrella presented as complete with canopy → 66.01. A replacement umbrella canopy (textile cover) sold separately → Ch.63 (made-up textile article), not 66.03.

classification_rules.rule: Key boundary: 66.02 (walking sticks/whips/crops) — multi-function sticks classified by principal function
classification_rules.description: Heading 66.02 covers: walking-sticks (plain or with seat), whips, riding-crops, canes and similar. When a stick has a secondary function that corresponds to another specific heading: WEAPON function → Ch.93 (sword-stick, firearm-stick — Note 1(b)). MEASURING function → 90.17. UMBRELLA function (stick-umbrella when closed) → 66.01 (umbrella is the primary product). SPORTING FUNCTION (polo mallet, hockey stick) → Ch.95. The principal function/design intent determines which applies.
